headlines.title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.

headlines.title: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies, government agencies: Reports
Trump eases pressure on Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh as inflation tops 4%
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump's economic advisors are giving Warsh space, as the new Fed chairman, on interest rates as the president repeats calls to cut.

headlines.title: Oracle stock has worst week since 2001 dot-com bust as AI financing concerns escalate
headlines.summary: Oracle's surging spending, negative free cash flow and $130 billion debt pile are weighing on the stock.

headlines.title: Jeremy Grantham says this is the most expensive market in 'American history'
headlines.summary: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.

headlines.title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back
headlines.summary: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.

headlines.title: OpenAI is reportedly delaying its IPO. Here's when Kalshi traders think it will announce
headlines.summary: Speculators think the OpenAI IPO will come early next year, with only one-in-three odds it happens in 2026 but a high likelihood it is done by June 2027.

headlines.title: Bitcoin is having a tough year. Traders are betting it's going to get worse
headlines.summary: Options traders are treating this break like it could be the tip of an iceberg.

headlines.title: Traders are getting worried the chip stock bull market is cracking. How to protect yourself
headlines.summary: Options traders were buying a lot of protection on the iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX) on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Why energy could be a great place to invest even with oil prices retreating — 5 stocks to buy
headlines.summary: It seems that buzz is building on investing in energy stocks in the wake of the Iran conflict.

headlines.title: Tesla and Waymo duel in the robotaxi race — but the company spending the most builds no cars at all
headlines.summary: Uber is quietly writing $500 million checks to lock in robotaxis as Waymo threatens to leave it behind.

headlines.title: SpaceX stock is a terrible buy — what that actually means for the bull market
headlines.summary: Overhyped IPOs rarely make you money in the short term. That doesn’t mean it’s time to sell your stocks..

headlines.title: ServiceNow, Salesforce and other software stocks surge as the OpenAI threat weakens
headlines.summary: Oracle’s stock missed out on the broader software rally, as the company is tied to OpenAI’s success through its cloud-infrastructure business.

headlines.title: U.S. confirms retaliatory strike on Iran, pulling oil prices up in after-hours trading
headlines.summary: Oil futures settled lower to post a third-straight weekly loss on Friday, but moved up in extended trading after the U.S. military confirmed a retaliatory strike on Iran.

headlines.title: Tech stocks just had one of their worst weeks in a year. Here’s how AI momentum went off the rails.
headlines.summary: It one of the worst weeks for tech stocks of the year, and Wall Street spent much of it confronting a question it had been too euphoric to ask: what exactly are we getting for all this AI spending?

headlines.title: Iran’s ship attack tests the shipping-insurance market just as war-risk premiums had plunged
headlines.summary: War-risk premiums narrowed considerably in recent days but could increase again.
